overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character navigates from street level up a staircase to an elevated walkway, crosses a busy intersection, and follows a pedestrian down a street lined with holographic billboards and overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level sidewalk adjacent to multi-lane road with parking garage

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead between buildings on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past a speed limit sign and parking garage entrance

notable_agents.action: flying car moving across the sky between skyscrapers

entered.detail: standard road sign indicating 40 speed limit mounted on pole
green neon illuminated parking garage entrance with signage
massive building-sized pink holographic advertisement display on skyscraper
greenish elevated highway structure running perpendicular to street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at street level, passing under an elevated highway overpass. Neon signs and a massive pink holographic billboard illuminate the scene while a flying vehicle passes overhead between the futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to elevated pedestrian walkway

events.description: transition from street level to ascending concrete staircase on right side

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to reach the upper level walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings ascending between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete staircase from street level to an elevated walkway. The pink holographic billboard remains visible to the left while the highway overpass now looms directly overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway crossing over major intersection

events.description: crossing wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings
entering covered area under massive highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing along the elevated walkway beneath overpasses

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: tiled pedestrian walkway with yellow safety lines at the top of the stairs
wide crosswalk with bold yellow striped markings crossing the multi-lane road
multiple layered digital advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated walkway and crosses a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. The area becomes increasingly covered by the highway overpass structure, with dense clusters of digital billboards lining the route and other pedestrians crossing in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street canyon passing under multiple overpasses with palm trees visible ahead

events.description: begin following a pedestrian in black clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
multiple flying vehicles visible hovering in the sky between distant buildings

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian down a wet street that passes under a series of overpasses

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black coat walking steadily ahead on the sidewalk
flying cars hovering stationary in the sky between skyscrapers

entered.detail: series of connected overpasses creating a tunnel effect over the street
tall palm trees visible in the distance lining the street
tall tower covered in digital advertisements visible at the end of the street canyon

segments.scene_description: The character follows a pedestrian in black down a street that acts as a canyon between massive structures, passing under multiple overpasses. Palm trees and distant flying vehicles become visible as the street opens up ahead, with wet pavement reflecting the surrounding neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit street level up to an elevated urban corridor that eventually opens into a towering architectural canyon. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath a highway overpass, where a massive pink holographic billboard and flying vehicles set a futuristic tone. As the character ascends a concrete staircase, the perspective shifts upward, keeping the pink hologram in view while the overpass structure looms more prominently overhead. The scene then expands onto an elevated walkway crossing a wide intersection with yellow markings, moving deeper under the highway's shadow amidst dense clusters of digital billboards and other pedestrians. Finally, the camera follows a figure in black down a street flanked by massive structures and multiple overpasses, where the view opens up to reveal palm trees and distant flying vehicles reflected in the damp pavement.
